title: trichomanes punctatum subsp. sphenoides
intro: Trichomanes punctatum subsp. sphenoides, also known as the sphenoid forked fern, is a rare and endangered species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trichomanes punctatum subsp. sphenoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and support respiratory health. The fern is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
